commands_run.command: uv run ruff check --select F,I src/tau_coding/generic_provider_adapter.py tests/test_generic_provider_adapter.py
uv run pytest tests/test_generic_provider_adapter.py tests/test_generic_dag.py tests/test_provider_pane_poc.py tests/test_run_status.py -q
uv run python - <<'PY' ... build_generic_provider_node_receipt canonical pass/block proof ... PY
for f in experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/p1-provider-work-order-binding-20260705T1322Z/*.json; do uv run python -m json.tool "$f" >/tmp/$(basename "$f"); done

proves: Canonical tau.provider_dag_work_order.v1 bindings now require agent, max_attempts, target repo, scratch worktree, receipt path, allowed paths, required evidence, forbidden actions, and embedded canonical work_order_sha256.
A complete canonical provider work order plus matching Herdr-visible provider record produces a PASS generic provider node receipt.
A canonical provider work order with a mismatched embedded work_order_sha256 produces a BLOCKED generic provider node receipt.
Legacy non-canonical adapter work orders remain explicitly LEGACY_UNBOUND for compatibility.
